writer.gspr_analysis: Regarding {gspr_id} ({requirement_summary}), the available evidence includes {sources}. The analysis demonstrates that {reasoning}. Therefore, the device {compliance_judgment}.
writer.benefit_risk_narrative: The benefit-risk profile of {device_name} is assessed across {ledger_count} dimensions. {favorable_count} dimensions are favorable, {uncertain_count} uncertain. The overall profile is {overall_balance} with {uncertainty_count} residual uncertainties.
writer.conclusion_guard: Conclusion wording is constrained to {allowed_strength}. Prohibited wording: {prohibited_terms}. Basis: {guard_reason}.
writer.sota_context: The SOTA benchmark for {endpoint} is {benchmark_value} (confidence: {confidence}). {device_name} {comparison_result} this benchmark based on {evidence_basis}.
writer.gap_statement: Evidence gap for {claim_id}: {gap_description}. Impact: {impact_level}. Recommended PMCF measure: {pmcf_measure} with target timeline {timeline}.

gap.insufficient_evidence: Evidence gap for {claim_id}: {gap_description}. Current evidence: {current_count} records ({current_weight}). Recommended: {pmcf_measure} within {timeline}.
gap.missing_endpoint: No SOTA benchmark available for {endpoint}. Suggested clinical alternatives: {alternatives}. If no alternative is clinically equivalent, flag as PMCF requirement.
gap.missing_fulltext: Full text not available for {evidence_count} records ({evidence_ids}). These records cannot support pivotal conclusions. Recommended: acquire full text or downgrade to supportive only.
gap.follow_up_insufficient: Available follow-up ({available_follow_up}) is inadequate for {device_class} device expected surveillance period ({expected_follow_up}). Gap: {gap_years} years. Recommended: PMCF study with minimum {required_follow_up} follow-up.
gap.population_mismatch: Study population ({study_population}) does not fully match IFU target population ({ifu_population}). Transferability requires documented justification. Without justification, evidence weight is downgraded.
gap.sample_size_insufficient: Sample size ({actual_n}) below threshold for {device_class} ({required_n}). Statistical power analysis required. If power is inadequate, evidence can only support background/risk context.
gap.gspr_gap: No clinical evidence mapped to {gspr_id} ({gspr_requirement}). This GSPR requirement must be addressed through {source_type} or flagged as a PMCF gap.
gap.equivalence_gap: Equivalence argument for {device_name} vs {equivalent_device} is incomplete. Missing: {missing_dimensions}. Until all three dimensions (technical, biological, clinical) are documented, equivalence cannot be claimed per MDCG 2020-5.

nb_defense.DO-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify all annexes are populated with actual data, not placeholder tables. Search protocol must include PRISMA flow. Evidence tables must be complete.
nb_defense.GS-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify every clinical data item in §4.7 is explicitly linked to a GSPR number. Create a GSPR-to-evidence cross-reference table.
nb_defense.LB-001_precheck: Pre-check: cross-reference CER §2.1 device description against IFU text. Verify device name, intended purpose, contraindications, and technical specs match exactly.
nb_defense.EV-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify literature appraisal methodology is documented with defined criteria. Each evidence item must have: study design, population, endpoint, results, quality score, limitations.
nb_defense.PM-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify PMCF plan has: specific objectives, measurable endpoints, target sample size, timeline, and method for each identified gap.
nb_defense.EQ-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify equivalence comparison covers all three MDCG 2020-5 dimensions (technical, biological, clinical). Each difference must have an impact assessment.
nb_defense.CL-001_precheck: Pre-check: verify claim conclusions do not exceed evidence strength. Cross-reference claim strength against evidence weight, sample size, and follow-up adequacy.

source: Based on 64 real NB defect records (BSI 50, TUV SUD 14) across 11 projects, 5 engineer-reviewed CER reports, and MDR/MEDDEV/MDCG regulatory requirements.
